mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO executor_handler ( executor_name, executor_address, executor_group, executor_app, handler_name, handler_desc, method_signature, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.executorName}, #{item.executorAddress}, #{item.executorGroup}, #{item.executorApp}, #{item.handlerName}, #{item.handlerDesc}, #{item.methodSignature}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, executor_name executorName, executor_address executorAddress, executor_group executorGroup, executor_app executorApp, handler_name handlerName, handler_desc handlerDesc, method_signature methodSignature, update_time updateTime FROM executor_handler WHERE executor_group = #{executorGroup} AND executor_app = #{executorApp} AND handler_name = #{handlerName} ORDER BY executor_address ASC
